description: Safety Dashboard MVP - Stats-based environmental safety monitoring app
vision: Expose hidden risks everywhere - Let users see safety stats (water quality, air quality, health risks, disasters) for any zip code

dataModel.innovation: Generic stats model instead of hardcoded types
benefits: Admins can add new stats without code changes
Bulk update stat values across thousands of zip codes
Choose which stats trigger push notifications
Flexible value types (number, string, percentage, status)

coreTypes.StatDefinition: Template defining a stat (title, category, valueType, triggersNotification)
coreTypes.ZipCodeStat: A stat's value for a specific zip code (value, status, updatedAt)
coreTypes.ZipCodeData: Complete zip code with all its stats

userStories.title: Create stats TypeScript types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want typed interfaces for the stats-based data model
acceptanceCriteria: StatDefinition type with id, title, image, description, valueType, category, triggersNotification, sortOrder
ZipCodeStat type with statId, value, status, updatedAt
ZipCodeData type with zipCode, city, state, country, stats[], hasActiveAlerts

userStories.title: Create mock stat definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want mock stat definitions for the 4 safety categories
acceptanceCriteria: Water stats: Lead Level, Pesticides, Radioactivity, Water Quality Index
Air stats: Radon Level, Air Quality Index, Industrial Pollution
Health stats: Active Outbreaks, Disease Risk
Disaster stats: Wildfire Risk, Flood Risk, Earthquake Risk
Each has valueType, category, triggersNotification flag

userStories.title: Create mock zip code data
userStories.description: As a developer, I want mock zip codes with their stats values
acceptanceCriteria: 5+ zip codes: J3R 5B9 Sorel-Tracy, 10001 New York, 90210 Beverly Hills, M5V 3L9 Toronto, H3B 1X8 Montreal
Each zip code has stats array with values and statuses
Mix of danger/warning/safe statuses across zip codes
getZipCodeData(zipCode) helper returns ZipCodeData or null
getStatsByCategory(zipCode) helper groups stats by category

userStories.title: Create mock hazard categories
userStories.description: As a developer, I want hazard categories for the report form
acceptanceCriteria: Includes: Water Contamination, Air Pollution, Disease Outbreak, Chemical Spill, Illegal Waste Dumping, Food Safety, Noise Pollution, Other

userStories.title: Create mock recommendations
userStories.description: As a developer, I want product recommendations linked to stat categories
acceptanceCriteria: Epic Water Filters for water category

userStories.title: Create mock data barrel export
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single import point for all mock data

userStories.title: Create safety category icons
userStories.description: As a user, I want category-specific icons to identify safety topics
acceptanceCriteria: All accept color prop with default '#000'

userStories.title: Create utility icons
userStories.description: As a user, I want utility icons for navigation and UI actions
acceptanceCriteria: All accept color prop with default '#000'

userStories.title: Create StatusIndicator component
userStories.description: As a user, I want colored indicators showing danger/warning/safe status

userStories.title: Create StatCategoryCard component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see stat categories with icons and status
acceptanceCriteria: Shows category icon on left (droplet, cloud, virus, flame)
Shows preview of top stats in category
Shows StatusIndicator dot with worst status in category
Handles onPress for navigation to detail view

userStories.title: Create StatCategoriesList component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all stat categories in a list

userStories.title: Create WarningBanner component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see emergency warnings prominently
acceptanceCriteria: Only renders for stats with status='danger' and triggersNotification=true

userStories.title: Create LocationHeader component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my current location prominently
acceptanceCriteria: Shows 'My Location' title in green/primary color
Shows city, state below zip code

userStories.title: Create SearchBar component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search for any location
acceptanceCriteria: Text input with placeholder 'Search for a state, city or street'

userStories.title: Create Dashboard page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a main dashboard showing my location's safety overview
acceptanceCriteria: Renders LocationHeader with current zip code
Renders WarningBanner if danger stats exist
Renders StatCategoriesList with stats grouped by category

userStories.title: Create ExpandableCard component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to expand/collapse sections to see details
acceptanceCriteria: Uses CaretDown icon that rotates 180° on toggle

userStories.title: Create StatItem component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see individual stat details
acceptanceCriteria: Shows value and status (Danger, Warning, Safe)
Shows external link icon if stat has sourceUrl

userStories.title: Create StatCategorySection component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to expand category sections to see stat details
acceptanceCriteria: Header shows category icon and name
Shows count of danger/warning stats in header

userStories.title: Create StatsDetailView component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a full detail view of all stats in a category
acceptanceCriteria: Header with back button and category name
Shows all stats for the category

userStories.title: Create Category Detail page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to drill into a category to see all stats
acceptanceCriteria: Loads stats for category from mock data

userStories.title: Create HazardReportForm component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to submit hazard reports with validation

userStories.title: Create SubmitReportScreen component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a complete report screen with branding

userStories.title: Create Report page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to access the hazard report form
acceptanceCriteria: Navigates back to dashboard on success

userStories.title: Create ProductRecommendationCard component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see product recommendations

userStories.title: Create RecommendationsSection component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see relevant recommendations based on hazards
